# Generated by tools/generate_pp_goods_output_map_modes.py — do not edit by hand.
# Heatmap: raw = local output × market_access; color factor = clamp(raw / 30, 0, 1) (0–30 → red→green).
# Locations with zero local output of the good get no overlay (terrain); sea/unowned stay grey.

@pp_goods_output_color_scale_max = 30

@zoom_step_near = 2
@data_gradient_alpha_inside = 1
@data_gradient_alpha_outside = 1
@data_gradient_width = 0.25
@data_gradient_color_mult = 0.9
@data_edge_width = 0
@data_edge_sharpness = 0.01
@data_edge_alpha = 0
@data_edge_color_mult = 0
@data_before_lighting_blend = 0.5
@data_after_lighting_blend = 0.5

pp_alum_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:alum)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_alum_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_ALUM_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_amber_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:amber)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_amber_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_AMBER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_cocoa_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:cocoa)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_cocoa_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_COCOA_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

				}

	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always

		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_fur_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:fur)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_fur_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_FUR_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_lead_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:lead)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_lead_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_LEAD_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

	medium_tooltip_context = location

	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no

	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_millet_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:millet)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_millet_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_MILLET_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:naval_supplies)" > 0
			}

					max = 1
					min = 0

			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}

		}
	}

		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_NAVAL_SUPPLIES_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult

		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness

	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_salt_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:salt)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_salt_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SALT_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes

					value = pp_saltpeter_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}

			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}

		}

		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }

	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near

		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside

					min = 0

		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_SAND_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }

	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location

	flatmap_behaviour = always

	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tin_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tin)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tin_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TIN_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }
}

pp_tobacco_output = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				has_owner = yes
				"goods_output(goods:tobacco)" > 0
			}
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = pp_tobacco_output_raw
					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					NOT = { has_owner = yes }
					is_land = no
				}
			}
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = { limit = { is_land = yes } value = MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_TT_LAND }
		else = { value = MAPMODE_PP_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_TT_WATER }
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = economy
	index = 3
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
	color_refresh_counters = { Month ProductionList LocationConstructionUnitChanged MarketReach }
	color_and_names_refresh_counters = { LocationOwnerChanged CountryStatus MarketReach }

					min = 0

			limit = {
				has_owner = yes

					divide = @pp_goods_output_color_scale_max
					max = 1
					min = 0

					is_land = no
